## Vendor software note

If you found this by comparing against Alteryx Designer or other proprietary
Alteryx tooling, describe the symptom only - what's wrong, and on what input.
Do not paste output from Alteryx tooling or exact values you learned by
running it. See CONTRIBUTING.md for why.
